Generated MCP plugin started successfully with healthy service status over stdio transport.
Repository structure/dependency discovery was sufficient (requirements.txt, pyproject.toml, setup.py detected), reducing generation ambiguity.
No runtime errors or warnings were reported in pipeline logs.
